original: 6 . Gatikathā
content: 6.趣的談論

original: 231. Gatisampattiyā ñāṇasampayutte katinaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 231.對趣的[成功]到達在智相應上多少因成為往生緣？

original: Khattiyamahāsālānaṃ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṃ gahapatimahāsālānaṃ kāmāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ ñāṇasampayutte katinaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 對大財富的剎帝利、大財富的婆羅門、大財富的[[gahapati#屋主]]、欲界天在智相應上多少因成為往生緣？

original: Rūpāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ katinaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 對色界天在智相應上多少因成為往生緣？

original: Arūpāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ katinaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 對無色界天在智相應上多少因成為往生緣？

original: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇasampayutte aṭṭhannaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti.
content: 對趣的到達在智相應上八因成為往生緣；

original: Khattiyamahāsālānaṃ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṃ gahapatimahāsālānaṃ kāmāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ ñāṇasampayutte aṭṭhannaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti.
content: 對大財富的剎帝利、大財富的婆羅門、大財富的屋主、欲界天在智相應上八因成為往生緣；

original: Rūpāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ aṭṭhannaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti.
content: 對色界天在智相應上八因成為往生緣；

original: Arūpāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ aṭṭhannaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti.
content: 對無色界天在智相應上八因成為往生緣。

original: 232. Gatisampattiyā ñāṇasampayutte katamesaṃ aṭṭhannaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 232.對趣的到達在智相應上哪八因成為往生緣？

original: Kusalakammassa javanakkhaṇe tayo hetū kusalā;
content: 在善業的速行剎那有三善因，

original: tasmiṃ khaṇe jātacetanāya sahajātapaccayā honti.
content: 在那個剎那有生起思的俱生緣，

original: Tena vuccati– kusalamūlapaccayāpi saṅkhārā.
content: 因為那樣被稱為以善根為緣有諸行(而諸行存在)。

original: Nikantikkhaṇe dve hetū akusalā;
content: 在欲求剎那有二不善因，

original: tasmiṃ khaṇe jātacetanāya sahajātapaccayā honti.
content: 在那個剎那有生起思的俱生緣，

original: Tena vuccati– akusalamūlapaccayāpi saṅkhārā.
content: 因為那樣被稱為以不善根為緣有諸行。

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo hetū abyākatā;
content: 在結生剎那有{{note|trigger=三無記因|text=《顯揚正法》的解說：「三善因」指「無貪善因、無瞋善因、無癡善因」(alobho kusalahetu adoso kusalahetu amoho kusalahetu)，「生起思」指「生起善思(好的念頭；正確的意志)」(jātāya kusalacetanāya)或「不善思」(akusalacetanāya)或「果報無記思」(vipākābyākatacetanāya)，「二不善因」指「貪不善因、癡不善因」(lobho akusalahetu moho akusalahetu)，「三無記因」指「無貪無記因、無瞋無記因、無癡無記因」(alobho abyākatahetu adoso abyākatahetu amoho abyākatahetu)。}}，

original: tasmiṃ khaṇe jātacetanāya sahajātapaccayā honti.
content: 在那個剎那有生起思的俱生緣，

original: Tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: ‘‘ nāmarūpapaccayāpi viññāṇaṃ, viññāṇapaccayāpi nāmarūpaṃ’’ .
content: 以名色為緣有識；以識為緣有名色。

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcakkhandhā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那五蘊為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro mahābhūtā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那[[cātummahābhūta#四大]]為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo jīvitasaṅkhārā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti , vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那三壽行為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca rūpañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那名與色為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣：

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那這十四法為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣，

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro khandhā arūpino sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那四無色蘊為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcindriyāni sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那五根為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo hetū sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那三因為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca viññāṇañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那名與識為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣：

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那這十四法為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣，

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime aṭṭhavīsati dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那這二十八法為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣。

original: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇasampayutte imesaṃ aṭṭhannaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti.
content: 對趣的到達在智相應上這{{note|trigger=八因|text=《顯揚正法》的解說，「三壽行」指「壽暖識」(āyu ca usmā ca viññāṇañca)，「名」指「受等三蘊」(vedanādayo tayo khandhā)，「五根」指「信根等」(saddhindriyādīni)，「二十八法」指前十四法與這十四法(purimā ca cuddasa, ime ca cuddasāti aṭṭhavīsati)，此二十八法皆歸為不相應緣，因為「在這裡，色的進入狀態離開相應緣後被說為不相應緣」(Idha rūpassāpi paviṭṭhattā sampayuttapaccayaṃ apanetvā vippayuttapaccayo vutto)，「三因」則未解說。「八因」指「在業堆積剎那的三善因、在欲求剎那的二不善因、在結生剎那的三無記因」(Kammāyūhanakkhaṇe tayo kusalahetū, nikantikkhaṇe dve akusalahetū, paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo abyākatahetūti evaṃ aṭṭha hetū)。}}成為往生緣。

original: Khattiyamahāsālānaṃ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṃ gahapatimahāsālānaṃ kāmāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ ñāṇasampayutte katamesaṃ aṭṭhannaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 對大財富的剎帝利、大財富的婆羅門、大財富的屋主、欲界天在智相應上哪八因成為往生緣？

original: Kusalakammassa javanakkhaṇe tayo hetū kusalā;
content: 在善業的速行剎那有三善因，

original: tasmiṃ khaṇe jātacetanāya sahajātapaccayā honti.
content: 在那個剎那有生起思的俱生緣，

original: Tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: ‘‘ kusalamūlapaccayāpi saṅkhārā’’.
content: 以善根為緣有諸行。

original: Nikantikkhaṇe dve hetū akusalā;

original: tasmiṃ khaṇe jātacetanāya sahajātapaccayā honti.

original: Tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo hetū abyākatā;

original: tasmiṃ khaṇe jātacetanāya sahajātapaccayā honti.

original: Tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: ‘‘ nāmarūpapaccayāpi viññāṇaṃ, viññāṇapaccayāpi nāmarūpaṃ’’.
content: 以名色為緣有識；以識為緣有名色。

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcakkhandhā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那五蘊為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro mahābhūtā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那四大為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo jīvitasaṅkhārā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.

content: 在結生剎那名與色為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣：

original: 233. Gatisampattiyā ñāṇavippayutte katinaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 233.對趣的[成功]到達在智不相應上多少因成為往生緣？

original: Khattiyamahāsālānaṃ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṃ gahapatimahāsālānaṃ kāmāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ ñāṇavippayutte katinaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 對大財富的剎帝利、大財富的婆羅門、大財富的屋主、欲界天在智不相應上多少因成為往生緣？

original: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇavippayutte channaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti.
content: 對趣的到達在智不相應上六因成為往生緣；

original: Khattiyamahāsālānaṃ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṃ gahapatimahāsālānaṃ kāmāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ ñāṇavippayutte channaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti .

original: Tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: ‘‘ nāmarūpapaccayāpi viññāṇaṃ, viññāṇapaccayāpi nāmarūpaṃ’’.
content: 以名色為緣有識；以識為緣有名色。

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe pañcakkhandhā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那五蘊為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro mahābhūtā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那四大為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe tayo jīvitasaṅkhārā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那三壽行為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca rūpañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那名與色為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣：

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime cuddasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那這十四法為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣，

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāro khandhā arūpino sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那四無色蘊為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe cattāri indriyāni sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那四根為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe dve hetū sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那二因為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣；

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe nāmañca viññāṇañca sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那名與識為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣：

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime dvādasa dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti .
content: 在結生剎那這{{note|trigger=十二法|text=《顯揚正法》的解說：「二善因」指「與智不相應狀態(ñāṇavippayuttattā)的無貪善因、無瞋善因」，「二無記因」指「就是無貪無瞋」(alobhādosāyeva)，「四根」指「信根等四」(saddhindriyādīni cattāri)，「十二法」指「慧根與無癡因的殘缺狀態為十二」(paññindriyassa amohahetussa ca parihīnattā dvādasa)。}}為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣，

original: Paṭisandhikkhaṇe ime chabbīsati dhammā sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, vippayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 在結生剎那這二十六法為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為不相應緣。

original: Gatisampattiyā ñāṇavippayutte imesaṃ channaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti.
content: 對趣的到達在智不相應上這六因成為往生緣。

original: Khattiyamahāsālānaṃ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṃ gahapatimahāsālānaṃ kāmāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ ñāṇavippayutte katamesaṃ channaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hoti?
content: 對大財富的剎帝利、大財富的婆羅門、大財富的屋主、欲界天在智不相應上哪六因成為往生緣？

original: Kusalakammassa javanakkhaṇe dve hetū kusalā;
content: 在善業的速行剎那有二善因，

original: tasmiṃ khaṇe jātacetanāya sahajātapaccayā honti.
content: 在那個剎那有生起思的俱生緣，

original: Tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: ‘‘ kusalamūlapaccayāpi saṅkhārā… pe… khattiyamahāsālānaṃ brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṃ gahapatimahāsālānaṃ kāmāvacarānaṃ devānaṃ ñāṇavippayutte imesaṃ channaṃ hetūnaṃ paccayā upapatti hotī’’ ti.
content: 以善根為緣有諸行。……（中略）對大財富的剎帝利、大財富的婆羅門、大財富的屋主、欲界天在智不相應上這六因成為往生緣。

original: Gatikathā niṭṭhitā.
content: 趣的談論終了。
